content: {"weakest_claims":[{"claim":"No research synthesis body was provided.","reason":"There are no substantive claims to evaluate, so any critique of specific claims would be fabricated.","suggested_check":"Provide the synthesis text and compare each major claim against its cited sources."},{"claim":"No source-backed conclusion can be assessed from the prompt alone.","reason":"The input contains task instructions but no findings, evidence, methodology, or citations.","suggested_check":"Verify that the synthesis includes citations for each factual claim and that the cited material supports the wording used."},{"claim":"The synthesis cannot be checked for balance, omissions, or overreach.","reason":"Without the body, there is no way to identify framing choices, unsupported generalizations, or missing counterevidence.","suggested_check":"Review the full synthesis against primary sources and note any claims that exceed the evidence."}],"missing_perspectives":["The actual synthesis body","The source list or bibliography used by the synthesis","The intended research question and scope"],"hallucination_risks":[],"sources_to_recheck":[]}
